use.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--logo-stroke, #2c5eca); stroke-width: 6; stroke-linecap: square;
fill: none; stroke: var(--logo-stroke, #2c5eca); stroke-width: 6; stroke-linecap: square;

text.style: fill: var(--logo-fill, #2c5eca); stroke: var(--logo-text-stroke, #ff6600); stroke-width: 1.5; font-family: 'Arial Black', verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 46px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 4px;
